name: SaaS-of-record (current math floor)
notes: Current 5-year projections at sim-comp multiples. Lupine becomes a respectable Synopsys-tier vertical software company. This is the math floor on the homepage.

name: Audit substrate (mid-platform)
notes: By FY35: $2T addressable from mid-ramp of phases 2-3; Lupine captures the median platform-infra rate (0.20%) at mid-platform multiples (17x). Comparable to Cloudflare or Hugging Face mature.

name: Category leader (audit + compute substrate)
notes: By FY40: phase-3 fully landed; Lupine is to atomistic ML what Synopsys is to EDA. ~0.5% capture rate at 18x multiple. Comparable to Synopsys today on a phase-mature market.

name: Civilizational infrastructure
notes: By FY45: phase-4 partially landed; Lupine is the canonical audit+compute layer for programmable matter at narrow material classes. ~1% capture rate at 20x multiple. Comparable to AWS/Microsoft Azure infra revenue scale.

name: Replicator default infra
notes: By FY50: phase-4 fully landed across drugs/alloys/semis/polymers/food; Lupine occupies the position TCP/IP holds for networks — the methodology layer that all matter design runs through. ~2% capture, 15x mature multiple.

name: Failure / wind-down
notes: Mathematically excluded here because the math floor section already accounts for the 50% Pr(zero) outcome. The ceiling table prices the conditional-on-execution scenarios.
